overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of a magical school, featuring floating candles, long wooden tables filled with students, warm golden light streaming through tall stained glass windows, and a translucent spectral figure walking through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candles and house tables

events.description: translucent blue spectral figure materializes and begins walking through the dining hall
spectral figure fades from view as it exits the frame

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from elevated balcony position overlooking the dining hall

notable_agents.action: translucent spectral figure walking between the dining tables toward the far end of the hall

entered.detail: clusters of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing magical warm illumination
large ornate stained glass window with gothic tracery at the far end of the hall
tall pointed stone arches lining the left side of the hall
lengthy wooden house tables with students seated along them eating and conversing
massive stone pillar supporting the balcony from which the scene is viewed
stone gargoyle sculpture perched on the balcony column in the foreground

segments.scene_description: A cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by floating candles and warm golden sunlight streaming through a large stained glass window. Students sit at long wooden tables while a translucent spectral figure briefly manifests and walks through the center of the hall before disappearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a sweeping cinematic glide through a grand gothic dining hall where the atmosphere shifts from a static scene of student life to a moment of supernatural manifestation. It begins by showcasing the vast architecture illuminated by floating candles and warm golden sunlight streaming through a large stained glass window. As the camera moves forward, the focus shifts toward the center of the hall where students are seated at long wooden tables. The scene then transforms as a translucent spectral figure manifests and glides through the space before finally disappearing into the ambient light.
